answers.where: industrial arena with the upgraded starter mech fighting drones
answers.action: move with WASD, manage Cooling, dash with Q, and fire rockets with E
answers.response: mesh-backed rocket modules are equipped on the mech, shots and explosions answer the combat input
answers.reward: salvage buys the shoulder rocket upgrade and proves the retest loop
answers.game_look: large lit 3D mech silhouette, mesh/material armor parts, glowing rockets, drones, arena grid, VFX, and compact HUD read as a game screen
